Fact.Name: Puerto Rico excluded income
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 2a. Income from Puerto Rico that you excluded.

Fact.Name: Form 2555 excluded income
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 2b. Amounts from lines 45 and 50 of Form 2555.

Fact.Name: Form 4563 excluded income
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 2c. Amount from line 15 of Form 4563.

Fact.Name: Total excluded income
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 2d. Add lines 2a through 2c.

Fact.Name: Modified AGI for dependent credits
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 3. Add lines 1 and 2d.

Fact.Name: CTC-eligible dependents
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 4. Number of qualifying children under age 17 with the required social security number.

Fact.Name: Total potential CTC
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 5. Multiply line 4 by $2,200.

Fact.Name: ODC-eligible dependents
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 6. Number of other dependents, including qualifying children not under age 17 or without required SSN.

Fact.Name: Total potential ODC
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 7. Multiply line 6 by $500.

Fact.Name: Total potential dependent credits
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 8. Add lines 5 and 7.

Fact.Name: Dependent credit phaseout threshold
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 9. $400,000 if MFJ, $200,000 for all other filing statuses.

Fact.Name: MAGI above phaseout threshold
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 10 intermediate. Line 3 minus line 9, floored at zero.

Fact.Name: MAGI above threshold rounded up to next $1,000
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 10. Subtract line 9 from line 3. If zero or less, enter 0. If more than zero and not a multiple of $1,000, enter the next multiple of $1,000.

Fact.Name: Dependent credit phaseout amount
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 11. Multiply line 10 by 5% (0.05).

Fact.Name: Credits after phaseout
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 12. Subtract line 11 from line 8. If zero or less, enter 0.

Fact.Name: Credit Limit Worksheet A line 2
Fact.Description: Sum of Schedule 3 lines 1, 2, 3, 4, 5b, 6d, 6f, 6l, and 6m.

Fact.Name: Credit Limit Worksheet A line 3
Fact.Description: Subtract Credit Limit Worksheet A line 2 from Form 1040 line 18.

Fact.Name: Credit Limit Worksheet A line 4
Fact.Description: Credit Limit Worksheet B result. Stubbed as $0.

Fact.Name: Credit limit
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 13. Credit Limit Worksheet A line 5. Subtract line 4 from line 3.

Fact.Name: Child tax credit and credit for other dependents
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 14. Enter the smaller of line 12 or line 13. This is your child tax credit and credit for other dependents.

Fact.Name: Remaining CTC and ODC
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 16a. Subtract line 14 from line 12.

Fact.Name: Total potential additional CTC
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 16b. Number of qualifying children under 17 multiplied by $1,700.

Fact.Name: Remaining potential additional CTC
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 17. Enter the smaller of line 16a or line 16b.

Fact.Name: Earned income
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 18a. Earned income (see instructions).

Fact.Name: Nontaxable combat pay
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 18b. Nontaxable combat pay (see instructions).

Fact.Name: Earned income above ACTC threshold
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 19. Subtract $2,500 from line 18a. If line 18a is $2,500 or less, enter 0.

Fact.Name: Regular maximum additional CTC
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 20. Multiply line 19 by 15% (0.15).

Fact.Name: Three or more CTC-eligible dependents
Fact.Description: Whether the taxpayer has three or more qualifying children under 17. Equivalent to line 16b being $5,100 or more.

Fact.Name: Withheld social security and Medicare taxes
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 21. Withheld social security, Medicare, and Additional Medicare taxes from Form(s) W-2, boxes 4 and 6.

Fact.Name: SE tax deduction and additional taxes
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 22. Total of Schedule 1 line 15, Schedule 2 lines 5, 6, and 13.

Fact.Name: Total FICA and SE tax
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 23. Add lines 21 and 22.

Fact.Name: EIC and excess social security
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 24. Total of Form 1040 line 27a and Schedule 3 line 11.

Fact.Name: FICA and SE tax excess over EIC
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 25. Subtract line 24 from line 23. If zero or less, enter 0.

Fact.Name: Maximum additional CTC
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 26. If 3+ qualifying children, enter the larger of line 20 or line 25. Otherwise, line 20.

Fact.Name: Additional child tax credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 8812 line 27. The smaller of line 17 or line 26. Enter on Form 1040 line 28.
